name: Atalaya Mining Plc
description: Atalaya Mining Plc is a European copper producer and development company. The company's flagship asset is the Proyecto Riotinto, an open-pit copper mine located in Andalusia, Spain. In addition to its core operations at Riotinto, Atalaya is actively involved in exploring and developing other mineral projects in Spain, including the Proyecto Touro in Galicia. The company focuses on sustainable mining practices and leveraging modern technology to optimize copper production and expand its resource base.
